title: GET /api/create-options: destinations and preset labels in one round trip
action:
Add GET /api/create-options returning {destinations: [{workspace_id, label, path, path_is_live}], presets: [{label}]}. Destinations come from snapshot.workspaces -- EVERY workspace, including one whose panes are all plain shells, which is the case today's /api/agents structurally drops (P1); cell 2 seeds exactly that workspace in the fake. path and path_is_live come from cell 1's provenance join; on a join miss path is null and the row still ships (P2).

Presets come from the gateway config, which AppState does not carry today. Widen AppState (src/web/mod.rs:30-49) WITHOUT changing AppState::new's signature -- add the preset list as a field set by a builder-style method or a field assignment at the call sites. AppState::new has THREE callers, and the third lives outside this cell's file scope: src/main.rs:264, test_state() (src/web/mod.rs:88-96), and tests/observe_reply_e2e.rs:13. Changing the signature would redden this cell's own verify on a file it is prohibited from touching. Only the label is exposed to the client; argv must never leave the process (P6).

Register the route in the table at src/web/mod.rs:51-61 with _auth: AuthSession as the first extractor, like every other authenticated route (P9). On a snapshot error return 502 {error: ...}, as api::agents already does. Name the new tests with the prefix createoptions_.

truths: A workspace with zero agents appears in destinations
The response body contains no argv anywhere, for any preset
An unauthenticated request gets a bare 404, indistinguishable from an unknown route
path_is_live is false for the seeded pane that has cwd but no foreground_cwd, and true for one that has both
AppState::new's signature is unchanged, so tests/observe_reply_e2e.rs compiles untouched
Every pre-existing web test stays green, /api/agents included
artifacts: The route registered in the existing table
AppState carrying the preset list without a new AppState::new parameter
At least 5 tests prefixed createoptions_, all passing: the agentless workspace, both provenance values, no-argv-in-body, and the unauthenticated 404
key_links: src/web/api.rs:29-56 -- the handler and error shape to mirror
src/web/api.rs:76-136 -- agents_lists_flat_snapshot, the test harness shape
src/web/auth.rs:141-154 -- unauth_agents_returns_opaque_404, the auth test to copy
tests/observe_reply_e2e.rs:13 -- the third construction site, out of scope and must keep compiling
prohibitions: Do not serialize argv into any response
Do not add a parameter to AppState::new
Do not put the whole Config into AppState if the preset list alone is enough
Do not change /api/agents or any existing route
Do not add a cfg(windows) branch anywhere under src/web/
Do not touch the frontend -- rendering is slice 5

verify: cargo test --quiet && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --lib -- createoptions_ 2>&1 | grep -qE 'test result: ok\. ([5-9]|[1-9][0-9]+) passed'

trace.outcome: Added GET /api/create-options: destinations from snapshot.workspaces (every workspace, including agentless w3) with path/path_is_live from cell 1's anchor_for_workspace; presets from AppState.agent_presets (label only, argv never serialized), attached via a new with_agent_presets builder so AppState::new's 3-caller signature stays untouched. Route registered behind AuthSession like every other route; snapshot error returns 502.
